name: snowflake-mcp-vscode
description: VS Code extension that exposes a Snowflake MCP server through a local Node.js broker using Microsoft Entra authentication.

snowflakeMcp.endpointUrl.markdownDescription: Snowflake MCP endpoint URL, for example `https://<account>.snowflakecomputing.com/api/v2/databases/<db>/schemas/<schema>/mcp-servers/<name>`.

snowflakeMcp.azureAppIdUri.markdownDescription: Application ID URI for the Microsoft Entra app used to obtain the Snowflake External OAuth token, for example `api://<app-id>`.

snowflakeMcp.azureTenantId.markdownDescription: Tenant ID used when requesting the Microsoft Entra token.

snowflakeMcp.role.markdownDescription: Snowflake role sent to the MCP endpoint using the `X-Snowflake-Role` header.

snowflakeMcp.serverLabel.markdownDescription: Label shown in VS Code for the generated MCP server definition.

snowflakeMcp.useAzureCli.markdownDescription: Use Azure CLI as the token source. The initial version of the extension requires this to stay enabled.

scripts.test: npm run test:broker && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run check && npm test && npm run package:vsix
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
